architecture_gray_areas.question: 自有多因子闭环主线还是 Qlib runner-first？
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: CR-030 contracts frozen and CR-026 separately approved for isolated runner Spike

architecture_gray_areas.question: 外部项目如何纳入矩阵而不成为默认框架？
architecture_gray_areas.selected: reference matrix with reference_only / optional_spike / exclude / forbidden_migration
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: external project becomes required by an approved downstream Spike or CR

architecture_gray_areas.question: schema 和校验是否从零设计、复用基线还是直接采用外部对象？
architecture_gray_areas.selected: project-owned contracts + existing baseline reuse + external cross-check + fail-closed
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: CP3 review identifies missing P0 fields that require HLD revision

architecture_gray_areas.question: 多因子组合默认采用可解释组合还是 optimizer / ML workflow？
architecture_gray_areas.selected: P0 explainable combiner; optimizer deferred to Spike
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: validated P0 combiner is insufficient and user approves optimizer dependency / risk model Spike

architecture_gray_areas.question: StrategyAdmissionPackage 到 QMT handoff 是否可能被误读为交易授权？
architecture_gray_areas.selected: draft handoff only; QMT remains not authorized
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: CR-020..CR-024 independently approved and Stage6 gate allows consumption

advisor_options.name: 项目自有多因子研究闭环主线
Qlib runner-first / qrun 集成
advisor_options.recommendation: not recommended for CR-030 default; deferred to CR-026 Spike

advisor_options.name: 文档 / Spike-only
advisor_options.recommendation: fallback if CP3 rejects contract freezing

advisor_options.name: 外部框架适配层 / adapter-first
advisor_options.recommendation: conditional future enhancement after internal contracts are frozen

selected_architecture_summary: 项目自有多因子研究闭环；外部项目仅作为 reference matrix / optional Spike / exclude / forbidden migration；schema 采用项目自有契约、既有基线复用、外部 cross-check 和 fail-closed。
